# Celestial Pathways of Guidance
## Scripture
"As you do not know the path of the wind, or how the body is formed in a mother’s womb, so you cannot understand the work of God, the Maker of all things." - Ecclesiastes 11:5

## Reflection
Just as the celestial bodies move in their designated pathways, our lives have a divine purpose and direction. The phases of the moon, the rotation of the planets, and the movement of the stars all remind us of the order and precision in God's creation. In the same way, God has a unique pathway for each of us, guiding us through the ups and downs of life. We may not always understand the twists and turns, but we can trust that He is the Maker of all things and that His ways are higher than ours.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, thank you for the reminder of your guidance and sovereignty in our lives. Just as the celestial bodies move in their designated pathways, help us to trust in your divine plan for us. Give us the faith to follow your lead, even when the path is uncertain. May we find comfort in the knowledge that you are the Maker of all things and that your ways are perfect. Guide us on our journey, and may we reflect your glory to the world around us. Amen.
